Platform Solutions

The Complete HR Intelligence Platform

From raw data ingestion to boardroom-ready insights — Titan Insights delivers end-to-end intelligence across every dimension of human capital management.

Core Capabilities

Six Pillars of HR Intelligence

Built for enterprise scale. Designed for HR leaders who demand precision, speed, and governance without compromise.

🔗
Seamless Data Integration

Native connectors pull data from payroll, HRIS, ATS, LMS, and performance systems into one governed Snowflake data warehouse — updated daily with zero manual intervention.

SnowflakeMatillion ELT50+ Connectors
📊
People Analytics Dashboards

Real-time Power BI dashboards for attrition, workforce cost, DEI, performance, and recruitment — built for HR leaders, not IT teams. No training required.

Power BIDAXStar Schema
🤖
AI-Powered Predictions

Machine learning models trained on your workforce data predict attrition 90 days in advance, forecast headcount needs, and surface retention recommendations automatically.

Predictive AIML ModelsAuto-Insights
📋
Executive Reporting Suite

Board-ready workforce reports generated in minutes, not days. Automated monthly and quarterly HR metrics packages with narrative commentary and trend analysis built in.

Automated ReportsSSRSBoard-Ready
🛡️
Governance & Compliance

Role-based access controls, row-level security, data masking, and audit trails ensure the right people see the right data. SOC2, GDPR, and PIPEDA compliant by design.

RBACSOC2GDPRPIPEDA
⚙️
Workflow Automation

Automate HR data pipelines, report distribution, compliance alerts, and approval workflows. Our ETL orchestration layer reduces manual processing by 40%+ from day one.

CDC PipelinesIncremental LoadsAlert Engine
How It Works

From Raw Data to Strategic Intelligence

1
Connect & Ingest

Link all HR systems via native connectors. Data flows automatically into your Snowflake warehouse daily.

2
Model & Govern

Apply dimensional models, business logic, RBAC, and data quality rules at the warehouse layer.

3
Visualize & Predict

Surface insights through Power BI dashboards and AI prediction models — updated in real time.

4
Act & Measure

Turn analytics into decisions with executive-ready outputs and feedback loops that improve over time.
